title: A few things to know before replacing Summer EBT cards
applyForSebtTitle: We recommend that you fill out an application for this child
applyForSebtBody: Children may not be automatically enrolled because we don't have enough information to determine their eligibility. But parents or guardians can apply to see if they are eligible.
applyForSebtBody1: The following children are NOT enrolled in Summer EBT for 2026
applyForSebtActionApply: Continue your Summer EBT application for children who aren't enrolled.
applyForSebtBody2: Children may not be automatically enrolled because we don't have enough information to determine their eligibility. If not, parents or guardians can apply to see if they qualify.
applyForSebtBody3: To receive food benefits for Summer 2026, you must apply by [Date]. Applying for Summer EBT usually takes 10 minutes or less.
applyForSebtBody4: After you apply, you will be contacted by mail once your application is reviewed.
applyForSebtAccordionTitle: How do I know if they're eligible?
applyForSebtAccordionBody1: You should apply if your child attends a school that participates in the National School Lunch Program (NSLP) or School Breakfast Program (SBP).
applyForSebtAccordionBody2: Tap here to continue your application
applyForSebtAccordionBody3: You may also use the dropdown below to check how much money your household can make in a year to be eligible.
applyForSebtAccordionLabelSelectNumberPe: Select the number of people in your household
applyForSebtAccordionBodyAlertIncome: If your household's total gross income is less than [$28,953] every year, you are likely to be eligible. Gross income is the amount before any deductions, taxes, or expenses are taken out.
applyForSebtCard1Title: To receive benefits for this summer, you must apply by August 25
applyForSebtCard1Body: The sooner you apply, the sooner your application will be reviewed. Applying for Summer EBT usually takes 15 minutes or less.
applyForSebtLibraryApplications: Copies of the paper application are also available at DC public libraries.
applyForSebtCard2Title: Do you have other children in your household?
applyForSebtCard2Body: To check if you need to submit a Summer EBT application for any other school-age children in your household, please provide their information by clicking on the button below.
streamlinedEnrolledTitle: Looks like your child is eligible, and you DO NOT need to submit an application for this child
streamlinedEnrolledBody:
Based on our records, we already have all the information we need to determine your child's Summer EBT eligibility for 2025.

2025 Summer EBT benefits were issued beginning in June 2025 and expire 122 days after issuance.
streamlinedEnrolledBody1: The following children are already enrolled in Summer EBT for 2026.
streamlinedEnrolledAlertTitle: Check the Summer EBT Portal to see where your enrolled children will receive their benefits.
streamlinedEnrolledAlertBody:
If they received the food benefit for a previous summer, we may issue their one-time $120 payment to the same Summer EBT card.

If your child is new to Summer EBT or their previous card needs to be replaced, we will mail a new card to the address we have on file.
streamlinedEnrolledAlertAction: To check the mailing address we have on file, log in to the Summer EBT Portal
streamlinedEnrolledBody2: We recommend logging into the Summer EBT portal to confirm
streamlinedEnrolledBody3: Scroll down to view information we found about your other children.
streamlinedEnrolledAction: Go to the Summer EBT Portal
streamlinedEnrolledCard1Title: Enrolled in SNAP or Colorado Works (TANF)?
streamlinedEnrolledCard1Body: If your student has SNAP or Colorado Works (TANF), your Summer EBT will be loaded on the existing SNAP or TANF card on that date.
streamlinedEnrolledCard2Title: Do you have other children in your household?
streamlinedEnrolledCard2Body: To check if you need to submit a Summer EBT application for any other school-age children in your household, please provide their information by clicking on the button below.
noneBody1: We don't have enough information for the following children.
noneBody2: We recommend logging into the Summer EBT portal to confirm if they are automatically enrolled.
errorTitle: Something went wrong on our end
errorBody: We aren’t able to able to share enrollment information for your children. You may try to check again later or continue with these next steps.
body:
Once a replacement card is created, the previous card will be permanently deactivated
Cards will arrive by mail in around 7-10 business days
Any remaining balance on the previous card will automatically be rolled over to the replacement card
summaryAddress: A new card will be mailed to the following address:
